name: softcar-playwright-bdd
description: Playwright + TypeScript + BDD API tests for the VCC softcar C3 flow

scripts.test: npm run bddgen && playwright test --require tsconfig-paths/register
scripts.test:c3: npm run bddgen && playwright test --require tsconfig-paths/register --grep @c3
scripts.test:headed: npm run bddgen && playwright test --require tsconfig-paths/register --headed
scripts.test:debug: npm run bddgen && playwright test --require tsconfig-paths/register --debug
scripts.test:ui: npm run bddgen && playwright test --require tsconfig-paths/register --ui
